sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 56:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 56:1
items.html: The ten Sefirot that sparkle, expand, and descend from the screen downward are regarded as having complete vessels; they are called the ten Sefirot of the Guf. (Part 3, Chapter 8, item 7)
